content.text: Now let me examine the lock management and test files to understand the current implementation patterns:

content.content:
1→package transflow
     2→
     3→import (
     4→	"bytes"
     5→	"context"
     6→	"io"
     7→	"testing"
     8→	"time"
     9→
    10→	"github.com/iw2rmb/ploy/internal/storage"
    11→	"github.com/stretchr/testify/assert"
    12→	"github.com/stretchr/testify/mock"
    13→)
    14→
    15→// Mock implementations for testing
    16→
    17→type MockStorage struct {
    18→	mock.Mock
    19→}
    20→
    21→func (m *MockStorage) Get(ctx context.Context, key string) (io.ReadCloser, error) {
    22→	args := m.Called(ctx, key)
    23→	if args.Get(0) == nil {
    24→		return nil, args.Error(1)
    25→	}
    26→	return args.Get(0).(io.ReadCloser), args.Error(1)
    27→}
    28→
    29→func (m *MockStorage) Put(ctx context.Context, key string, reader io.Reader, opts ...storage.PutOption) error {
    30→	args := m.Called(ctx, key, reader, opts)
    31→	return args.Error(0)
    32→}
    33→
    34→func (m *MockStorage) Delete(ctx context.Context, key string) error {
    35→	args := m.Called(ctx, key)
    36→	return args.Error(0)
    37→}
    38→
    39→func (m *MockStorage) Exists(ctx context.Context, key string) (bool, error) {
    40→	args := m.Called(ctx, key)
    41→	return args.Bool(0), args.Error(1)
    42→}
    43→
    44→func (m *MockStorage) List(ctx context.Context, opts storage.ListOptions) ([]storage.Object, error) {
    45→	args := m.Called(ctx, opts)
    46→	if args.Get(0) == nil {
    47→		return nil, args.Error(1)
    48→	}
    49→	return args.Get(0).([]storage.Object), args.Error(1)
    50→}
    51→
    52→func (m *MockStorage) DeleteBatch(ctx context.Context, keys []string) error {
    53→	args := m.Called(ctx, keys)
    54→	return args.Error(0)
    55→}
    56→
    57→func (m *MockStorage) Head(ctx context.Context, key string) (*storage.Object, error) {
    58→	args := m.Called(ctx, key)
    59→	if args.Get(0) == nil {
    60→		return nil, args.Error(1)
    61→	}
    62→	return args.Get(0).(*storage.Object), args.Error(1)
    63→}
    64→
    65→func (m *MockStorage) UpdateMetadata(ctx context.Context, key string, metadata map[string]string) error {
    66→	args := m.Called(ctx, key, metadata)
    67→	return args.Error(0)
    68→}
    69→
    70→func (m *MockStorage) Copy(ctx context.Context, src, dst string) error {
    71→	args := m.Called(ctx, src, dst)
    72→	return args.Error(0)
    73→}
    74→
    75→func (m *MockStorage) Move(ctx context.Context, src, dst string) error {
    76→	args := m.Called(ctx, src, dst)
    77→	return args.Error(0)
    78→}
    79→
    80→func (m *MockStorage) Health(ctx context.Context) error {
    81→	args := m.Called(ctx)
    82→	return args.Error(0)
    83→}
    84→
    85→func (m *MockStorage) Metrics() *storage.StorageMetrics {
    86→	args := m.Called()
    87→	if args.Get(0) == nil {
    88→		return nil
    89→	}
    90→	return args.Get(0).(*storage.StorageMetrics)
    91→}
    92→
    93→type MockLockManager struct {
    94→	mock.Mock
    95→}
    96→
    97→func (m *MockLockManager) AcquireLock(ctx context.Context, key string, ttl time.Duration) (*Lock, error) {
    98→	args := m.Called(ctx, key, ttl)
    99→	if args.Get(0) == nil {
   100→		return nil, args.Error(1)
   101→	}
   102→	return args.Get(0).(*Lock), args.Error(1)
   103→}
   104→
   105→func (m *MockLockManager) ReleaseLock(ctx context.Context, lock *Lock) error {
   106→	args := m.Called(ctx, lock)
   107→	return args.Error(0)
   108→}
   109→
   110→func (m *MockLockManager) IsLocked(ctx context.Context, key string) (bool, error) {
   111→	args := m.Called(ctx, key)
   112→	return args.Bool(0), args.Error(1)
   113→}
   114→
   115→func (m *MockLockManager) TryWithLockRetry(ctx context.Context, key string, config *LockConfig, fn func() error) error {
   116→	args := m.Called(ctx, key, config, fn)
   117→	return args.Error(0)
   118→}

   120→// Test data
   121→
   122→func createTestCaseRecord() *CaseRecord {
   123→	return &CaseRecord{
   124→		RunID:     "test-run-123",
   125→		Timestamp: time.Now(),
   126→		Language:  "java",
   127→		Signature: "abc123def456",
   128→		Context: &CaseContext{
   129→			Language:        "java",
   130→			Lane:            "A",
   131→			RepoURL:         "https://github.com/test/repo.git",
   132→			CompilerVersion: "javac 11.0.1",
   133→		},
   134→		Attempt: &HealingAttempt{
   135→			Type:   "orw_recipe",
   136→			Recipe: "org.openrewrite.java.RemoveUnusedImports",
   137→		},
   138→		Outcome: &HealingOutcome{
   139→			Success:     true,
   140→			BuildStatus: "passed",
   141→			Duration:    5000, // 5 seconds in ms
   142→			CompletedAt: time.Now(),
   143→		},
   144→		BuildLogs: &SanitizedLogs{
   145→			Stdout:    "Build successful",
   146→			Stderr:    "",
   147→			Truncated: false,
   148→		},
   149→	}
   150→}
   151→
   152→func createTestSummaryRecord() *SummaryRecord {
   153→	return &SummaryRecord{
   154→		Language:  "java",
   155→		Signature: "abc123def456",
   156→		Promoted: []PromotedFix{
   157→			{
   158→				Kind:          "orw_recipe",
   159→				Ref:           "org.openrewrite.java.RemoveUnusedImports",
   160→				Score:         0.85,
   161→				Wins:          5,
   162→				Failures:      1,
   163→				LastSuccessAt: time.Now(),
   164→				FirstSeenAt:   time.Now().Add(-24 * time.Hour),
   165→			},
   166→		},
   167→		Stats: &SummaryStats{
   168→			TotalCases:   6,
   169→			SuccessCount: 5,
   170→			FailureCount: 1,
   171→			SuccessRate:  0.833,
   172→			LastUpdated:  time.Now(),
   173→			AvgDuration:  4500,
   174→		},
   175→	}
   176→}
   177→
   178→// Unit Tests
   179→
   180→func TestSeaweedFSKBStorage_WriteCase(t *testing.T) {
   181→	mockStorage := new(MockStorage)
   182→	mockLockMgr := new(MockLockManager)
   183→	kbStorage := NewSeaweedFSKBStorage(mockStorage, mockLockMgr)
   184→
   185→	ctx := context.Background()
   186→	caseRecord := createTestCaseRecord()
   187→
   188→	// Mock storage Put call
   189→	mockStorage.On("Put", ctx, "kb/healing/errors/java/abc123def456/cases/test-run-123.json", mock.AnythingOfType("*bytes.Reader"), mock.AnythingOfType("storage.PutOption")).Return(nil)
   190→
   191→	err := kbStorage.WriteCase(ctx, "java", "abc123def456", "test-run-123", caseRecord)
   192→
   193→	assert.NoError(t, err)
   194→	mockStorage.AssertExpectations(t)
   195→}
   196→
   197→func TestSeaweedFSKBStorage_ReadCases(t *testing.T) {
   198→	mockStorage := new(MockStorage)
   199→	mockLockMgr := new(MockLockManager)
   200→	kbStorage := NewSeaweedFSKBStorage(mockStorage, mockLockMgr)
   201→
   202→	ctx := context.Background()
   203→
   204→	// Create test data
   205→	caseRecord := createTestCaseRecord()
   206→	caseJSON := `{
   207→		"run_id": "test-run-123",
   208→		"timestamp": "2023-12-01T10:00:00Z",
   209→		"language": "java",
   210→		"signature": "abc123def456",
   211→		"context": {
   212→			"language": "java",
   213→			"lane": "A"
   214→		},
   215→		"attempt": {
   216→			"type": "orw_recipe",
   217→			"recipe": "org.openrewrite.java.RemoveUnusedImports"
   218→		},
   219→		"outcome": {
   220→			"success": true,
   221→			"build_status": "passed",
   222→			"duration_ms": 5000,
   223→			"completed_at": "2023-12-01T10:00:05Z"
   224→		}
   225→	}`
   226→
   227→	// Mock objects returned by List
   228→	objects := []storage.Object{
   229→		{
   230→			Key: "kb/healing/errors/java/abc123def456/cases/test-run-123.json",
   231→		},
   232→	}
   233→
   234→	// Mock List call
   235→	mockStorage.On("List", ctx, storage.ListOptions{
   236→		Prefix:  "kb/healing/errors/java/abc123def456/cases/",
   237→		MaxKeys: 1000,
   238→	}).Return(objects, nil)
   239→
   240→	// Mock Get call
   241→	reader := io.NopCloser(bytes.NewReader([]byte(caseJSON)))
   242→	mockStorage.On("Get", ctx, "kb/healing/errors/java/abc123def456/cases/test-run-123.json").Return(reader, nil)
   243→
   244→	cases, err := kbStorage.ReadCases(ctx, "java", "abc123def456")
   245→
   246→	assert.NoError(t, err)
   247→	assert.Len(t, cases, 1)
   248→	assert.Equal(t, "test-run-123", cases[0].RunID)
   249→	assert.Equal(t, "java", cases[0].Language)
   250→	assert.Equal(t, "orw_recipe", cases[0].Attempt.Type)
   251→	mockStorage.AssertExpectations(t)
   252→}
   253→
   254→func TestSeaweedFSKBStorage_WriteSummary(t *testing.T) {
   255→	mockStorage := new(MockStorage)
   256→	mockLockMgr := new(MockLockManager)
   257→	kbStorage := NewSeaweedFSKBStorage(mockStorage, mockLockMgr)
   258→
   259→	ctx := context.Background()
   260→	summary := createTestSummaryRecord()
   261→
   262→	// Mock storage Put call
   263→	mockStorage.On("Put", ctx, "kb/healing/errors/java/abc123def456/summary.json", mock.AnythingOfType("*bytes.Reader"), mock.AnythingOfType("storage.PutOption")).Return(nil)
   264→
   265→	err := kbStorage.WriteSummary(ctx, "java", "abc123def456", summary)
   266→
   267→	assert.NoError(t, err)
   268→	mockStorage.AssertExpectations(t)
   269→}
   270→
   271→func TestSeaweedFSKBStorage_ReadSummary(t *testing.T) {
   272→	mockStorage := new(MockStorage)
   273→	mockLockMgr := new(MockLockManager)
   274→	kbStorage := NewSeaweedFSKBStorage(mockStorage, mockLockMgr)
   275→
   276→	ctx := context.Background()
   277→
   278→	summaryJSON := `{
   279→		"language": "java",
   280→		"signature": "abc123def456",
   281→		"promoted": [
   282→			{
   283→				"kind": "orw_recipe",
   284→				"ref": "org.openrewrite.java.RemoveUnusedImports",
   285→				"score": 0.85,
   286→				"wins": 5,
   287→				"failures": 1
   288→			}
   289→		],
   290→		"stats": {
   291→			"total_cases": 6,
   292→			"success_count": 5,
   293→			"failure_count": 1,
   294→			"success_rate": 0.833
   295→		}
   296→	}`
   297→
   298→	reader := io.NopCloser(bytes.NewReader([]byte(summaryJSON)))
   299→	mockStorage.On("Get", ctx, "kb/healing/errors/java/abc123def456/summary.json").Return(reader, nil)
   300→
   301→	summary, err := kbStorage.ReadSummary(ctx, "java", "abc123def456")
   302→
   303→	assert.NoError(t, err)
   304→	assert.Equal(t, "java", summary.Language)
   305→	assert.Equal(t, "abc123def456", summary.Signature)
   306→	assert.Len(t, summary.Promoted, 1)
   307→	assert.Equal(t, "orw_recipe", summary.Promoted[0].Kind)
   308→	assert.Equal(t, 6, summary.Stats.TotalCases)
   309→	mockStorage.AssertExpectations(t)
   310→}

   312→func TestSeaweedFSKBStorage_StorePatch(t *testing.T) {
   313→	mockStorage := new(MockStorage)
   314→	mockLockMgr := new(MockLockManager)
   315→	kbStorage := NewSeaweedFSKBStorage(mockStorage, mockLockMgr)
   316→
   317→	ctx := context.Background()
   318→	patchContent := []byte("--- a/Test.java\n+++ b/Test.java\n@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@\n-import java.util.*;\n+\n class Test {\n }")
   319→	fingerprint := "abcd1234567890ef"
   320→
   321→	// Mock storage Put call
   322→	mockStorage.On("Put", ctx, "kb/healing/patches/abcd1234567890ef.patch", mock.AnythingOfType("*bytes.Reader"), mock.AnythingOfType("storage.PutOption")).Return(nil)
   323→
   324→	err := kbStorage.StorePatch(ctx, fingerprint, patchContent)
   325→
   326→	assert.NoError(t, err)
   327→	mockStorage.AssertExpectations(t)
   328→}
   329→
   330→func TestSeaweedFSKBStorage_GetPatch(t *testing.T) {
   331→	mockStorage := new(MockStorage)
   332→	mockLockMgr := new(MockLockManager)
   333→	kbStorage := NewSeaweedFSKBStorage(mockStorage, mockLockMgr)
   334→
   335→	ctx := context.Background()
   336→	fingerprint := "abcd1234567890ef"
   337→	patchContent := []byte("--- a/Test.java\n+++ b/Test.java\n@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@\n-import java.util.*;\n+\n class Test {\n }")
   338→
   339→	reader := io.NopCloser(bytes.NewReader(patchContent))
   340→	mockStorage.On("Get", ctx, "kb/healing/patches/abcd1234567890ef.patch").Return(reader, nil)
   341→
   342→	result, err := kbStorage.GetPatch(ctx, fingerprint)
   343→
   344→	assert.NoError(t, err)
   345→	assert.Equal(t, patchContent, result)
   346→	mockStorage.AssertExpectations(t)
   347→}

   365→

   375→func TestSeaweedFSKBStorage_Health(t *testing.T) {
   376→	mockStorage := new(MockStorage)
   377→	mockLockMgr := new(MockLockManager)
   378→	kbStorage := NewSeaweedFSKBStorage(mockStorage, mockLockMgr)

   391→// Integration test style - testing key building logic
   392→func TestSeaweedFSKBStorage_KeyBuilding(t *testing.T) {
   393→	mockStorage := new(MockStorage)
   394→	mockLockMgr := new(MockLockManager)
   395→	kbStorage := NewSeaweedFSKBStorage(mockStorage, mockLockMgr)
   396→
   397→	tests := []struct {
   398→		name     string
   399→		method   string
   400→		input    []string
   401→		expected string
   402→	}{
   403→		{
   404→			name:     "case key",
   405→			method:   "buildCaseKey",
   406→			input:    []string{"java", "abc123def456", "run-001"},
   407→			expected: "kb/healing/errors/java/abc123def456/cases/run-001.json",
   408→		},
   409→		{
   410→			name:     "cases prefix",
   411→			method:   "buildCasesPrefix",
   412→			input:    []string{"java", "abc123def456"},
   413→			expected: "kb/healing/errors/java/abc123def456/cases/",
   414→		},
   415→		{
   416→			name:     "summary key",
   417→			method:   "buildSummaryKey",
   418→			input:    []string{"java", "abc123def456"},
   419→			expected: "kb/healing/errors/java/abc123def456/summary.json",
   420→		},
   421→		{
   422→			name:     "patch key",
   423→			method:   "buildPatchKey",
   424→			input:    []string{"abcd1234567890ef"},
   425→			expected: "kb/healing/patches/abcd1234567890ef.patch",
   426→		},
   427→	}
   428→
   429→	for _, test := range tests {
   430→		t.Run(test.name, func(t *testing.T) {
   431→			var result string
   432→			switch test.method {
   433→			case "buildCaseKey":
   434→				result = kbStorage.buildCaseKey(test.input[0], test.input[1], test.input[2])
   435→			case "buildCasesPrefix":
   436→				result = kbStorage.buildCasesPrefix(test.input[0], test.input[1])
   437→			case "buildSummaryKey":
   438→				result = kbStorage.buildSummaryKey(test.input[0], test.input[1])
   439→			case "buildPatchKey":
   440→				result = kbStorage.buildPatchKey(test.input[0])
   441→			}
   442→			assert.Equal(t, test.expected, result)
   443→		})
   444→	}
   445→}
